titleStmt.title: SII 9.81: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 81. (A.R. No. 89 of 1904.) ON THE 6TH SLAB SET UP ON THE SOUTH SIDE OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

summary.p: The contents of the record are the same as those of No. 80.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ōṁ namaḥ śaṁkarāya . pūjyānāmapi pūjyāya vēdhasāmapi vēdhasē . samaṁ caturmmukhīgītabrahmaṇē brahmaṇē
namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . gaṇapatē namaḥ
cūḍāpīḍakapāḷasaṁkuḷanumaṁdākinīvārayō vidyullōlalalāṭalōcanapuṭajyōtirvvi miśratviṣaḥ . pāṁtu tvāma
kaṭhōrakētakaśikhāsaṁdigdhamugdhēndavō bhūtēśasya bhujaṁgavallivaḷayasraṅnaddhajāṭājaṭāḥ . namastasmai
varāhāya līlayā caratō mahīṁ . khurāntaragatō yasya mēruḥ khaṇakhaṇāyatē . jayatyāviṣkṛtaṁ
viṣṇōrvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇavaṁ . dakṣiṇōnnatadamṣṭrāgraviśrāṁtabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ . namō gurubhyaḥ . namassarasvatyai .
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ sa
tyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ mallikāmōdaṁ śrīmajjagadēkamallajayasiṅghadē vara rājyamutta
rōttarābhivṛddhige saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi svasti samadhigatapañcamahāśabda pallavānvaya śrīpṛ
thvīvallabhaṁ pallavakuḷatiḷikaṁ maṇḍaḷikalalāṭalōcanaṁ ghaṭeyoḍaga(ṁ)ṇḍa kadanakaṇṭhīravanamōghavākya kāṁ
cīpuravarēśvaraṁ śrīmajjagadēkamallanoḻaṁbapallavapermmānaḍigaḷenisi negaḻdudayādityadēvarggaṁgavāḍi toṁbha
ttaṟusāyiramuṁ kaḍaṁbaḻike sāyiramuṁ kōgaḻiyaynūṟuṁ māsavāḍi nūṟanālvattaṟoḷagaṇnapaṁcagrāma
gaḷuṁ ballakuṁde mūnūṟuṁ veḍedoṟe yicchāsiradoḷagaṇa kudihāraveṟpattuva nidhinidhāna nikṣēpa duṣṭanigrahaviśiṣṭapra
tipāḷanaṁgeydu tuṁgabhadreya taḍiya kaṁpuli bīḍinoḷi(r)®du sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttire .
śakabhūpāḷakāḷākrāṁtanāmadhēyasaṁvatsaragaḷa 940 tteneya kāḷāyuktasaṁvatsaraṁ pravarttisa tadvarṣābhyaṁtarada pu
ṣyaśuddha 13 Ādityavāramuttarāyaṇasaṁkrāntiyuṁ vyatīpātavuṁ kūḍidaṁdudeyādityadēvaru paṁpāpurada tī
rtthake bijayaṁgeydu tatkāladoḷu bāḷguḷiya kalidēvasvāmige bikkiganeḷpattaṟoḷagaṇa nāraṇōjhara śaṁkarō
jharanācimayyana keṟegaḷoḷagāgi lōgēśvarada polada caturāghāṭa śīmeyiṁdoḷaguḷḷa bhomiyaṁ dēvara nivēdya
kkaṁ naṁdādīvigegaṁ tapōdhanara satrakkaṁ pannirvarssūḷayarggaṁ sūḷavāḷaṁga vaṁcigaṁgaṁ paṟekāṟarggaṁ pātrakkaṁ dēsigacchā
trara bhōjanakkemeṁdu samakaṭṭi trikālabhōgaṁ naḍevaṁtāgi yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunajapahōmā
nuṣṭhāṇaparāyaṇarappa śrīmatsōmasiṅghabhaḷārara kālaṁ kaḻci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ sarvvanama śyamāge
kuḍe tadīyasvāmiya besadiṁ . svasti samastarājyabharanirūpitamahāmātyapadavīvirājamānamānō(ṁ)
nnataprabhumaṁtrōtsāhaśaktitrayasaṁpaṁnarappa śrimatperggaḍe narasiṅghayyaṁ sōmasiṅgha bhaḷāraranoḍa
goṇḍu bāḷguḷige vaṁdu svastyudadhiparivritavikhyātōttuṁgamagāṁgēya yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇaja
pahōmānuṣṭhāṇaparāyaṇarvviśiṣṭhajanāśrayarvvidyāśritāśrayaraciṁtyamahārṇnava
rccāḷukyacakrēśvaradattiyappa śrīmatu bāḷguḷiya mahājanamayvadiṁbaruvaṁ bikkiganeḻpattaṟa maṁneya
bikkiyuṁ bhīrabhaṭṭanumaṁ bāḷguḷige varisi kalidēvasvāmiya mahājanadadhyakṣadoḷu bikki kaḻcalu bīrabhaṭṭane
ṟeye sōmasiṅghabhaḷārara kālaṁ kaḻcisi dhāreyaneṟeyisi keḻegoḍaṁgeyi dasavaṁdhavaṁ koṇḍu keṟegaḷaṁ paḍisalisu
varu lōgēśvarada catussīme mūḍalu nāraṇōjhara keṟeya mūḍaṇa kōḍiyiṁ teṁka bare berkkuṁdoṟeyiṁ śaṁkarōjhara
keṟeya mūḍaṇa kōḍiyiṁ taṁkalēṟuduradiṁ paḍuva bare kerggalliṁ kuduregalliṁda vaḍḍagalliṁ maṇiyereyiṁ paḍuva Aḍḍaviṟivanake
ṟeyiṁ baḍaga bare nīrgguṁdada bhaṇḍivaṭṭeyiṁdānedoṟeviḍidaṁte nāraṇōjhara keṟeya mūḍaṇa kōḍiyaṁ kūḍitī dharmmavaṁ
pratipāḷisida mahāpuruṣaṁ vārāṇasiyalsahasra brāhmaṇarggubhayamukhi sahasra kavile yaṁ koṭṭa dā
nada phaḷavī dharmavanaḷidātaṁ vāraṇāsiyoḷinituvanaḷida pātaka . ślōka . bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktā rājabhissagarādibhiḥ .
yasya yasya yadābhūmistasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭhirvarṣasahasrā
ṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . na viṣaṁ viṣamityāhurddēvasvaṁ viṣamucyatē . viṣamēkākinaṁ hanti
dēvasvaṁ putrapautrikaṁ . kaṁda . kalidēvasvāmige kaṁpileyoḷu tannāḷdanitta dattiyumanitaṁ palaraṟiye
paḍedu matta śiḷāsāsanadoḷu viśēṣadiṁ bareyisida . Antakanāṁtaribalake murāntakanudyōgadeḍege śauryyōcitadoḷkoṁtisu
tanenipa mahāśrīmantana maganele negaḻda narasiṅghayya .
Digital edition of SII 9.81 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
